hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select b.[Created_Dt] as TransactionDate, a.[Amount] AS AMOUNT from [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesDocument] a join [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges] b on a.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = b.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] where b.Unbillable = 0 and a.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = :id

select b.[Created_Dt] as TransactionDate, a.[Amount] AS AMOUNT from [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesFee] a join [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges] b on a.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = b.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] where a.[IsCustomFee] = 0 and b.Unbillable = 0 and a.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = :id

select b.[Created_Dt] as TransactionDate, a.[Amount] AS AMOUNT from [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesFee] a join [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges] b on a.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = b.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] where a.[IsCustomFee] = 1 and b.Unbillable = 0 and a.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = :id

select b.[Created_Dt] as TransactionDate, a.[ShippingCharge] AS AMOUNT from [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesShipping] a join [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges] b on a.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = b.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] where b.Unbillable = 0 and a.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = :id

select b.[Created_Dt] as TransactionDate, a.[Salestax_Amount] AS AMOUNT from [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesDocument] a join [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges] b on a.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = b.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] where b.Unbillable = 0 and a.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = :id

select b.[Created_Dt] as TransactionDate, a.[Salestax_Amount] AS AMOUNT from [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesFee] a join [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges] b on a.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = b.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] where a.[IsCustomFee] = 0 and b.Unbillable = 0 and a.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = :id

select b.[Created_Dt] as TransactionDate, a.[Salestax_Amount] AS AMOUNT from [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesFee] a join [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges] b on a.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = b.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] where a.[IsCustomFee] = 1 and b.Unbillable = 0 and a.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = :id

select b.[Created_Dt] as TransactionDate, a.[Amount] AS AMOUNT from [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesDocument] a join [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges] b on a.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = b.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] where b.Unbillable = 1 and a.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = :id

select b.[Created_Dt] as TransactionDate, a.[Amount] AS AMOUNT from [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesFee] a join [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges] b on a.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = b.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] where a.[IsCustomFee] = 0 and b.Unbillable = 1 and a.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = :id

select b.[Created_Dt] as TransactionDate, a.[Amount] AS AMOUNT from [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesFee] a join [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges] b on a.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = b.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] where a.[IsCustomFee] = 1 and b.Unbillable = 1 and a.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = :id

select b.[Created_Dt] as TransactionDate, a.[ShippingCharge] AS AMOUNT from [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesShipping] a join [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges] b on a.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = b.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] where b.Unbillable = 1 and a.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = :id

select b.[Created_Dt] as TransactionDate, a.[Salestax_Amount] AS AMOUNT from [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesDocument] a join [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges] b on a.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = b.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] where b.Unbillable = 1 and a.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = :id

select b.[Created_Dt] as TransactionDate, a.[Salestax_Amount] AS AMOUNT from [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesFee] a join [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges] b on a.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = b.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] where a.[IsCustomFee] = 0 and b.Unbillable = 1 and a.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = :id

select b.[Created_Dt] as TransactionDate, a.[Salestax_Amount] AS AMOUNT from [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesFee] a join [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges] b on a.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = b.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] where a.[IsCustomFee] = 1 and b.Unbillable = 1 and a.[ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq] = :id
select [Created_Dt] as TransactionDate, AMOUNT from [ROI_RequestorPayment] where [ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq] = :id
select [PaymentDate] as TransactionDate, AMOUNT from [ROI_RequestorPayment] where [ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq] = :id
select [Created_Dt] as TransactionDate, [Amount] AS AMOUNT FROM [ROI_requestorAdjustment] where [ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq] = :id
select [Created_Dt] as TransactionDate, [Amount] AS AMOUNT FROM [ROI_requestorAdjustment] where [ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq] = :id
select [Created_Dt] as TransactionDate, [Amount] AS AMOUNT FROM [ROI_requestorAdjustment] where [ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq] = :id
select [Created_Dt] as TransactionDate, [Amount] AS AMOUNT FROM [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorAdjustment] where [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq] = :id

select [Created_Dt] as TransactionDate, [SalesTaxReduction] AS AMOUNT FROM [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorAdjustment] where [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq] = :id
select [Created_Dt] as TransactionDate, [Amount] AS AMOUNT FROM [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorPayment] where [ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorPayment_Seq] = :id
select [Date] as TransactionDate, [Amount] AS AMOUNT from [ROI_RequestorRefund] where [ROI_RequestorRefund_Seq] = :id

INSERT INTO ROI_JournalDetail ( ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq, ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_Seq, ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq, ROI_JournalDetailTemplate_Seq, CreditDebitSideFlag, DecreaseIncreaseFlag, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq, ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq, ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq, ROI_RequestorRefund_Seq, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorPayment_Seq, ROI_JournalEntry_Seq, TxnOccurenceTimestamp, Amount) VALUES ( ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
INSERT INTO ROI_JournalEntry ( ROI_Requestor_Seq, ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq) VALUES (:requestorId, :txnEventId); SELECT SCOPE_IDENTITY();

SELECT b.ROI_Requestor_Seq FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges a JOIN ROI_RequestCoreRequestor b on (a.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = b.ROI_RequestCore_Seq) WHERE a.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = :transactionId
SELECT ROI_Requestor_Seq FROM ROI_RequestorPayment WHERE ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq = :transactionId
SELECT ROI_Requestor_Seq FROM ROI_RequestorRefund WHERE ROI_RequestorRefund_Seq = :transactionId
SELECT ROI_Requestor_Seq FROM ROI_RequestorAdjustment WHERE ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq = :transactionId

SELECT a.ROI_Requestor_Seq FROM ROI_RequestorAdjustment a JOIN ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorAdjustment b on (a.ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq = b.ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq) WHERE b.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq = :transactionId

SELECT a.ROI_Requestor_Seq FROM ROI_RequestorPayment a JOIN ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorPayment b on (a.ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq = b.ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq) WHERE b.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorPayment_Seq = :transactionId

SELECT ROI_JournalDetailTemplate_Seq id, Created_By_Seq createdBy, Created_Dt createdDt, Modified_Dt modifiedDt, Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq txnTypeId, ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_Seq lineItemTypeId, ROI_LedgerAccount_Seq ledgerAccountId, CreditDebitSideFlag credit, DecreaseIncreaseFlag increase, ActiveInactiveFlag active FROM cabinet..ROI_JournalDetailTemplate

SELECT ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType_Seq id, Created_By_Seq createdBy, Created_Dt createdDt, Modified_Dt modifiedDt, Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, ROI_FinancialEntity_Seq entityId, ROI_FinancialTxnEvent_Seq txnTypeId, Name name, Code code, SummarizedAmountOnlyQuery query FROM cabinet..ROI_FinancialEntityLineItemType

select A.ROI_LedgerAccountType_Seq balance, A.ROI_LedgerAccountCategory_Seq id, A.LiquidityOrder liquidityOrder, case when (A.name = 'Document Charges' OR A.name = 'Standard Fees' OR A.name = 'Custom Fees' OR A.Name = 'Shipping Fees') then 'Income(Revenue),Sales,' + A.Name when (A.Name = 'Document Charges Discounts' OR A.name = 'Standard Fees Discounts' OR A.name = 'Custom Fees Discounts' OR A.Name = 'Shipping Fees Discounts') then 'Income(Revenue),Sales Discounts,' + A.Name when (A.Name = 'Fees Reversals' OR A.name = 'Customer Goodwill') then 'Income(Revenue),Sales Returns and Allowances,' + A.Name when (A.Name = 'Bad Debt') then 'Expenses,"",' + A.Name when (A.Name = 'Cash' OR A.name = 'Accounts Receivables') then 'Asset,"",' + A.Name when (A.Name = 'Sales Tax Payable' OR A.name = 'Pre Payments' OR A.name = 'Unapplied Payments') then 'Liability,"",' + A.Name end as name, A.Code code FROM ( select ROI_LedgerAccountType_Seq , ISNULL(ROI_LedgerAccountCategory_Seq,-3) as -- replacing null value with -3 since the expense account does not have category ROI_LedgerAccountCategory_Seq, LiquidityOrder,name,code from ROI_LedgerAccount) A group by A.ROI_LedgerAccountType_Seq, ROI_LedgerAccountCategory_Seq, LiquidityOrder,name,code order by ROI_LedgerAccountCategory_Seq desc, ROI_LedgerAccountType_Seq desc, LiquidityOrder asc;
